---
title: "GAM analysis"
author: "Eitan Gelfand"
date: "2025-03-12"
output: html_document
---
# script prep
```{r}
df <- read.csv("full_data_slope.csv")
library(mgcv)   # For GAM
library(dplyr)  # For convenient data manipulation (e.g., subset)
library(ggplot2) # For plotting (optional, you can also use mgcv’s plot)

```

#subset the data
```{r}
# Subset for each Race x bias combination
df_asian_biasm <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Asian" & Regression == "biasm")
df_asian_biasp <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Asian" & Regression == "biasp")
df_cauc_biasm  <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Caucasian" & Regression == "biasm")
df_cauc_biasp  <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Caucasian" & Regression == "biasp")

```

#GAM Fit
```{r}
m_asian_biasm <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_asian_biasm,
                     method = "REML")

m_asian_biasp <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_asian_biasp,
                     method = "REML")

m_cauc_biasm  <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_cauc_biasm,
                     method = "REML")

m_cauc_biasp  <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_cauc_biasp,
                     method = "REML")

```
#GAM run check
```{r}
# Summaries
summary(m_asian_biasm)
summary(m_asian_biasp)
summary(m_cauc_biasm)
summary(m_cauc_biasp)

# Diagnostic checks
gam.check(m_asian_biasm)
gam.check(m_asian_biasp)
gam.check(m_cauc_biasm)
gam.check(m_cauc_biasp)
```
#mgvs plot
```{r}
plot(m_asian_biasm, shade = TRUE, pages = 1, main = "Asian x biasm")
png("gam_asian_biasm.png", width = 800, height = 600)
plot(m_asian_biasp, shade = TRUE, pages = 1, main = "Asian x biasp")
plot(m_cauc_biasm, shade = TRUE, pages = 1, main = "Caucasian x biasm")
plot(m_cauc_biasp, shade = TRUE, pages = 1, main = "Caucasian x biasp")

png("gam_all_groups.png", width = 1600, height = 1200)
par(mfrow = c(2,2))  # Arrange plots in 2x2 layout
plot(m_asian_biasm, shade = TRUE, main = "Asian x biasm",ylab ="slope")
plot(m_asian_biasp, shade = TRUE, main = "Asian x biasp",ylab ="slope")
plot(m_cauc_biasm, shade = TRUE, main = "Caucasian x biasm",ylab ="slope")
plot(m_cauc_biasp, shade = TRUE, main = "Caucasian x biasp",ylab ="slope")
dev.off()
```
#expirments
```{r}
df_asian <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Asian")
df_cauc  <- subset(df, ExperimentName == "Caucasian")

m_asian <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_asian,
                     method = "REML")

m_cauc <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_cauc,
                     method = "REML")

summary(m_asian)
summary(m_cauc)

png("gam_asian_cauc.png", width = 1200, height = 600)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))  # 1 row, 2 columns
plot(m_asian, shade = TRUE, main = "Asian", ylab = "Slope")
plot(m_cauc, shade = TRUE, main = "Caucasian", ylab = "Slope")
dev.off()

```

#expirments
```{r}
df_biasm <- subset(df, Regression == "biasm")
df_biasp  <- subset(df, Regression == "biasp")

m_biasm <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_biasm,
                     method = "REML")

m_biasp <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k = 8),
                     data = df_biasp,
                     method = "REML")

summary(m_biasm)
summary(m_biasp)

png("gam_biasm_biasp.png", width = 1200, height = 600)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))  # 1 row, 2 columns
plot(m_biasm, shade = TRUE, main = "biasm", ylab = "Slope")
plot(m_biasp, shade = TRUE, main = "biasp", ylab = "Slope")
dev.off()

```
#AIC compare
```{r}
# 1. Linear
linear_mod <- lm(slope ~ Age, data = df)

# 2. Quadratic
quad_mod   <- lm(slope ~ Age + I(Age^2), data = df)

# 3. GAM with ML for fair comparison
gam_mod_ml <- gam(slope ~ s(Age, k=8), data=df, method="ML")

# Compare AIC
AIC(linear_mod, quad_mod, gam_mod_ml)

```

#sag table
```{r}
cat("==== Asian + biasm ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_asian_biasm)

cat("==== Asian + biasp ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_asian_biasp)

cat("==== Caucasian + biasm ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_cauc_biasm)

cat("==== Caucasian + biasp ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_cauc_biasp)


get_minimal_info <- function(model) {
  sm <- summary(model)
  
  # More nuanced p-value labeling
  p_label <- function(p) {
    if (p < 1e-4) {
      "< 1e-4"
    } else if (p < 1e-4) {
      "< 0.0001"        # catches values that would round to 0.0000
    } else {
      paste(round(p, 4))
    }
  }
  
  intercept_p <- sm$p.table[1, 4]  # parametric (intercept) p-value
  smooth_p    <- sm$s.table[1, 4]  # smooth term p-value
  edf         <- sm$s.table[1, 1]  # effective degrees of freedom
  r2          <- sm$r.sq
  dev_expl    <- sm$dev.expl
  
  cat("Intercept p-value:", p_label(intercept_p), "\n")
  cat("Smooth p-value:   ", p_label(smooth_p), "\n")
  cat("edf:              ", round(edf, 2), "\n")
  cat("R-sq (adj):       ", round(r2, 3), "\n")
  cat("Deviance expl.:   ", round(dev_expl * 100, 1), "%\n\n")
}


```

#sag table
```{r}
# Define the helper function first
get_minimal_info <- function(model) {
  sm <- summary(model)
  
  # p-value labeling: if p is extremely small, print "< 1e-4", else round to 4 decimals
  p_label <- function(p) {
    if (p < 1e-4) {
      "< 1e-4"
    } else {
      paste(round(p, 4))
    }
  }
  
  intercept_p <- sm$p.table[1, 4]  # parametric (intercept) p-value
  smooth_p    <- sm$s.table[1, 4]   # smooth term p-value
  edf         <- sm$s.table[1, 1]   # effective degrees of freedom
  r2          <- sm$r.sq           # adjusted R-squared
  dev_expl    <- sm$dev.expl       # deviance explained
  
  cat("Intercept p-value:", p_label(intercept_p), "\n")
  cat("Smooth p-value:   ", p_label(smooth_p), "\n")
  cat("edf:              ", round(edf, 2), "\n")
  cat("R-sq (adj):       ", round(r2, 3), "\n")
  cat("Deviance expl.:   ", round(dev_expl * 100, 1), "%\n\n")
}

# Now call the function for each model
cat("==== Asian + biasm ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_asian_biasm)

cat("==== Asian + biasp ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_asian_biasp)

cat("==== Caucasian + biasm ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_cauc_biasm)

cat("==== Caucasian + biasp ====\n")
get_minimal_info(m_cauc_biasp)

```
